checks.item: Each page has a unique, descriptive title
checks.manual_check: Check browser title/tab and compare against page purpose.
checks.pass_condition: Document has a non-empty <title> element
checks.fail_condition: No <title> element or <title> is empty
checks.suggested_fix: Add a descriptive <title> element in the <head>

checks.item: The page language is declared correctly
checks.manual_check: Inspect <html lang> and verify it matches the primary page language.
checks.pass_condition: <html> element has a valid lang attribute with a BCP 47 language tag
checks.fail_condition: <html> element has no lang attribute or an empty/invalid value
checks.suggested_fix: Add lang attribute to <html>, e.g. <html lang="en">

checks.item: Headings reflect the content structure in a logical order
checks.sc_name: Info and Relationships; Headings and Labels
checks.manual_check: Review headings with styles disabled or via accessibility tree.
checks.pass_condition: Heading levels (h1-h6) do not skip levels and h1 appears first
checks.fail_condition: Heading levels skip (e.g., h1 to h3) or no h1 is present
checks.suggested_fix: Restructure headings to follow a logical hierarchy without skipping levels

checks.item: Semantic HTML is used appropriately for headings, lists, buttons, links, tables, and landmarks
checks.sc_name: Info and Relationships; Name, Role, Value
checks.manual_check: Inspect markup and verify correct native semantics before ARIA.
checks.pass_condition: Navigation uses <nav>, main content uses <main>, buttons use <button>, links use <a>
checks.fail_condition: Non-semantic elements (div/span) used for interactive or structural roles without ARIA
checks.suggested_fix: Replace <div> with appropriate semantic elements (<nav>, <main>, <button>, <a>, etc.)

checks.item: Repeated content can be bypassed, such as with a skip link
checks.manual_check: Tab from page start and verify bypass mechanism works.
checks.pass_condition: A skip link or bypass mechanism exists near the start of the document
checks.fail_condition: No skip link, <main> landmark, or other bypass mechanism found
checks.suggested_fix: Add a skip link as the first focusable element: Skip to content

checks.item: Information and instructions are not conveyed by color, shape, location, or sound alone
checks.manual_check: Check states/instructions/errors without relying only on visual or auditory cues.
checks.pass_condition: Instructions and information use text labels, not just color/shape/location/sound
checks.fail_condition: Directions rely solely on sensory characteristics (e.g., 'click the red button')
checks.suggested_fix: Add text labels alongside visual/auditory cues

checks.item: Repeated navigation and repeated UI appear in a consistent order
checks.manual_check: Compare key pages and confirm repeated elements keep relative order.
checks.pass_condition: Repeated navigation components appear in the same relative order across pages
checks.fail_condition: Navigation order varies between pages without clear reason
checks.suggested_fix: Ensure shared navigation components maintain consistent ordering across all pages

checks.item: All functionality works with a keyboard alone
checks.manual_check: Navigate and operate the experience using only keyboard.
checks.pass_condition: All interactive elements are natively focusable or have tabindex and keyboard event handlers
checks.fail_condition: Interactive element uses only mouse events (onclick on div) without keyboard support
checks.suggested_fix: Use native interactive elements (<button>, <a>) or add tabindex='0' and keydown/keypress handlers

checks.item: There are no keyboard traps
checks.manual_check: Ensure focus can always move away using standard keys.
checks.pass_condition: No element prevents focus from moving away via Tab or Escape
checks.fail_condition: Focus is trapped in an element with no documented escape mechanism
checks.suggested_fix: Ensure all focus-trapping components (modals) provide keyboard escape, and non-modal components don't trap focus

checks.item: Focus order is logical
checks.manual_check: Tab through page and verify order matches reading and task flow.
checks.pass_condition: No positive tabindex values; DOM order matches visual reading order
checks.fail_condition: Positive tabindex values force non-logical focus order, or DOM order mismatches visual layout
checks.suggested_fix: Remove positive tabindex values and reorder DOM to match visual layout

checks.item: Focus moves appropriately when opening or closing dynamic UI
checks.manual_check: Open/close menus, dialogs, disclosures and verify focus lands logically.
checks.pass_condition: Dynamic UI (dialogs, menus) moves focus on open and restores on close
checks.fail_condition: Focus does not move when dynamic content appears or is not restored when it closes
checks.suggested_fix: Add focus management: move focus to new content on open, return to trigger on close

checks.item: Focus is clearly visible
checks.manual_check: Verify visible focus indicator on all focusable elements.
checks.pass_condition: No CSS rules that remove focus indicators (outline: none/0) without replacement
checks.fail_condition: CSS removes focus outline without providing an alternative visible indicator
checks.suggested_fix: Remove 'outline: none' or 'outline: 0' rules, or replace with a visible custom focus style

checks.item: Focused elements are not hidden behind sticky or overlaying UI
checks.manual_check: Scroll and tab through page; ensure focus remains visible.
checks.pass_condition: No fixed/sticky positioned elements that could obscure focused content without scroll-padding or equivalent
checks.fail_condition: Fixed/sticky elements exist without scroll-margin/scroll-padding to prevent focus obscurance
checks.suggested_fix: Add scroll-padding-top to account for sticky header height, or use scroll-margin on focusable elements

checks.item: Links are used for navigation and buttons are used for actions
checks.manual_check: Inspect semantics and activation behavior.
checks.pass_condition: <a> elements have href and navigate; <button> elements trigger actions; no role misuse
checks.fail_condition: <a> without href used as button, <button> used for navigation, or div/span used for either without proper role
checks.suggested_fix: Use <a href> for navigation and <button> for actions. Replace div/span click handlers with proper elements

checks.item: Link purpose is clear from the text or its context
checks.manual_check: Read links in place and confirm purpose is understandable.
checks.pass_condition: Links have descriptive text content, aria-label, or aria-labelledby; no bare 'click here' or 'read more'
checks.fail_condition: Link text is generic ('click here', 'read more', 'here') without aria-label providing context
checks.suggested_fix: Replace generic link text with descriptive text, or add aria-label describing the destination

checks.item: Icon-only controls have an accessible name
checks.sc_name: Name, Role, Value; Label in Name
checks.manual_check: Check accessible name in accessibility tree or screen reader.
checks.pass_condition: Every button/link containing only an icon has aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visually-hidden text
checks.fail_condition: Button or link contains only an icon (, ) with no accessible name
checks.suggested_fix: Add aria-label to the button/link, or add a visually-hidden <span> with descriptive text

checks.item: Custom controls expose the correct name, role, state, and value
checks.manual_check: Inspect accessibility tree and test state changes.
checks.pass_condition: Custom interactive elements have appropriate role, aria-label/aria-labelledby, and state attributes
checks.fail_condition: Custom component (div/span) acts as a control without role, accessible name, or state attributes
checks.suggested_fix: Add appropriate ARIA role, accessible name (aria-label), and state attributes (aria-expanded, etc.)

checks.item: Controls do not trigger unexpected context changes on focus or input
checks.manual_check: Focus and edit controls; confirm no surprise navigation or major UI changes.
checks.pass_condition: No onfocus/onchange handlers that navigate or significantly alter the page without user activation
checks.fail_condition: Form control or link triggers navigation or major UI change on focus or input without explicit submit
checks.suggested_fix: Move context-changing behavior to explicit user actions (button click, form submit)

checks.item: Pointer targets are large enough except where exempted
checks.manual_check: Measure or inspect hit area against target size guidance.
checks.pass_condition: Interactive elements have explicit minimum dimensions of 24x24 CSS pixels or are inline/sentence text
checks.fail_condition: Interactive element has explicit dimensions below 24x24 CSS pixels
checks.suggested_fix: Increase target size to at least 24x24 CSS pixels using min-width/min-height or padding

checks.item: Color is not the only way information, errors, or required fields are communicated
checks.manual_check: Check for labels/icons/text equivalents beyond color.
checks.pass_condition: Error states, required fields, and status indicators use text/icons in addition to color
checks.fail_condition: Information conveyed by color alone with no text, icon, or pattern alternative
checks.suggested_fix: Add text labels, icons, or patterns alongside color-based indicators

checks.item: Normal text contrast is at least 4.5:1
checks.manual_check: Test representative text/background pairs.
checks.pass_condition: Hardcoded text colors meet 4.5:1 contrast ratio against their background
checks.fail_condition: Hardcoded color pair has contrast ratio below 4.5:1 for normal text
checks.suggested_fix: Adjust text or background color to meet 4.5:1 minimum contrast ratio

checks.item: Large text contrast is at least 3:1
checks.manual_check: Test large text/background pairs.
checks.pass_condition: Large text (18pt+ or 14pt+ bold) color pairs meet 3:1 contrast ratio
checks.fail_condition: Large text color pair has contrast ratio below 3:1
checks.suggested_fix: Adjust text or background color to meet 3:1 minimum contrast ratio for large text

checks.item: Text can be resized to 200% without loss of content or function
checks.manual_check: Zoom text/viewport and verify usability.
checks.pass_condition: Content remains usable and no information is lost at 200% text zoom
checks.fail_condition: Content is clipped, overlaps, or becomes unusable at 200% zoom
checks.suggested_fix: Use relative units (rem, em, %) instead of fixed px for text and container sizes

checks.item: Content reflows without two-dimensional scrolling, except where essential
checks.manual_check: Test at narrow viewport / 400% zoom where applicable.
checks.pass_condition: Content reflows to single column at 320px width without horizontal scrolling
checks.fail_condition: Horizontal scrollbar appears at 320px viewport width for non-exempt content
checks.suggested_fix: Use responsive design with flexible layouts, avoid fixed widths exceeding 320px

checks.item: Images of text are avoided unless essential
checks.manual_check: Check UI assets and marketing content for text baked into images.
checks.pass_condition: No elements containing text that could be rendered as actual HTML text
checks.fail_condition: Images are used for text content that could be implemented as styled HTML text
checks.suggested_fix: Replace images of text with styled HTML text using CSS for visual presentation

checks.item: Text spacing changes do not break content or functionality
checks.manual_check: Apply increased line/paragraph/letter/word spacing and verify layout.
checks.pass_condition: Content remains readable with increased line-height, letter-spacing, word-spacing, and paragraph spacing
checks.fail_condition: Content is clipped or overlaps when text spacing is increased per WCAG 1.4.12 values
checks.suggested_fix: Avoid fixed container heights; use flexible layouts that accommodate text spacing changes

checks.item: Normal text contrast is at least 7:1
checks.manual_check: Test representative text/background pairs for AAA.
checks.pass_condition: Hardcoded text colors meet 7:1 contrast ratio against their background
checks.fail_condition: Hardcoded color pair has contrast ratio below 7:1 for normal text
checks.suggested_fix: Adjust text or background color to meet 7:1 enhanced contrast ratio

checks.item: Large text contrast is at least 4.5:1
checks.manual_check: Test large text/background pairs for AAA.
checks.pass_condition: Large text color pairs meet 4.5:1 contrast ratio (AAA enhanced)
checks.fail_condition: Large text color pair has contrast ratio below 4.5:1 (AAA)
checks.suggested_fix: Adjust text or background color to meet 4.5:1 enhanced contrast ratio for large text

checks.item: Informative images have appropriate alt text
checks.manual_check: Review alt text for meaning, not literal appearance.
checks.pass_condition: All elements have an alt attribute; informative images have non-empty alt text
checks.fail_condition: element is missing the alt attribute entirely
checks.suggested_fix: Add alt attribute: alt="description" for informative images, alt="" for decorative

checks.item: Decorative images are hidden from assistive technology
checks.manual_check: Verify decorative assets have null alt or are otherwise ignored.
checks.pass_condition: Decorative images have alt="", role="presentation", or aria-hidden="true"
checks.fail_condition: Decorative image has non-empty alt text or no alt attribute
checks.suggested_fix: Add alt="" to decorative images, or use role="presentation" / aria-hidden="true"

checks.item: Functional images describe the action or destination
checks.manual_check: Check alt or accessible name matches function.
checks.pass_condition: Images inside links/buttons have alt text describing the action or destination, not the image appearance
checks.fail_condition: Functional image (inside <a> or <button>) has no alt text or alt describes appearance instead of function
checks.suggested_fix: Set alt text to describe the action (e.g., 'Search', 'Go to homepage') not the image appearance

checks.item: Complex graphics have an equivalent text explanation
checks.manual_check: Verify nearby explanation or linked long description.
checks.pass_condition: Complex images (charts, diagrams) have extended description via aria-describedby, longdesc, or adjacent text
checks.fail_condition: Complex graphic has only a brief alt with no extended explanation available
checks.suggested_fix: Add a detailed text description near the graphic or link to a long description

checks.item: Data tables use proper table markup and header associations
checks.manual_check: Inspect th/header associations and screen reader navigation.
checks.pass_condition: <table> elements use <th> for headers, with scope or headers attributes for complex tables
checks.fail_condition: <table> has no <th> elements, or complex table lacks scope/headers attributes
checks.suggested_fix: Add <th> elements for column/row headers with scope="col" or scope="row"

checks.item: Non-text UI elements and meaningful graphics have sufficient contrast
checks.manual_check: Test component boundaries, icons, indicators, charts as applicable.
checks.pass_condition: Non-text UI elements (icons, borders, focus indicators) have 3:1 contrast against adjacent colors
checks.fail_condition: Non-text UI element has contrast ratio below 3:1 against adjacent color
checks.suggested_fix: Increase contrast of UI element boundaries, icons, or indicators to at least 3:1

checks.item: Every form control has a programmatically associated label
checks.sc_name: Info and Relationships; Labels or Instructions
checks.manual_check: Inspect labels/accessibility tree and test with screen reader.
checks.pass_condition: Every <input>, <select>, <textarea> has an associated <label> (for/id), aria-label, or aria-labelledby
checks.fail_condition: Form control exists without any label association (<label>, aria-label, or aria-labelledby)
checks.suggested_fix: Add <label for="fieldId"> matching the control's id, or add aria-label attribute

checks.item: Required fields are identified clearly
checks.manual_check: Check visible and programmatic indication of required status.
checks.pass_condition: Required fields have required attribute, aria-required="true", or visible required indicator with text
checks.fail_condition: Required field has no programmatic or visible required indication
checks.suggested_fix: Add required attribute or aria-required="true", plus visible text indicator

checks.item: Placeholder text is not the only label
checks.manual_check: Confirm each field still has a label when placeholder disappears.
checks.pass_condition: Form controls with placeholder also have a visible <label>, aria-label, or aria-labelledby
checks.fail_condition: Form control uses placeholder as the only label with no <label>, aria-label, or aria-labelledby
checks.suggested_fix: Add a visible <label> element in addition to the placeholder attribute

checks.item: Instructions are provided before users need them
checks.manual_check: Review task flow and verify instructions are available in time.
checks.pass_condition: Form instructions appear before the controls they describe in DOM order
checks.fail_condition: Instructions for form completion appear after the relevant controls or are absent
checks.suggested_fix: Place instructions before the form or at the top of the form group

checks.item: Errors are described in text and not by color alone
checks.manual_check: Trigger errors and inspect message content and styling.
checks.pass_condition: Error states include text messages, not just color changes (red borders, etc.)
checks.fail_condition: Error indication uses only color (e.g., red border) without text message
checks.suggested_fix: Add visible error text message alongside any color-based error indication

checks.item: Users can identify which field has an error
checks.manual_check: Trigger validation and confirm field association is clear.
checks.pass_condition: Error messages reference or are visually adjacent to the specific field with the error
checks.fail_condition: Error message is generic or displayed far from the erroneous field
checks.suggested_fix: Display error messages adjacent to or within the field group, identifying the specific field

checks.item: Error messages are associated with the relevant field where possible
checks.manual_check: Inspect aria-describedby / inline linkage and announcements.
checks.pass_condition: Error message elements are linked to their field via aria-describedby or aria-errormessage
checks.fail_condition: Error message exists near a field but has no programmatic association (aria-describedby/aria-errormessage)
checks.suggested_fix: Add aria-describedby on the input pointing to the error message element's id

checks.item: Input purpose is identified programmatically for common personal-data fields where applicable
checks.manual_check: Check autocomplete tokens on relevant inputs.
checks.pass_condition: Personal data inputs (name, email, phone, address, etc.) have appropriate autocomplete attribute
checks.fail_condition: Personal data input field is missing autocomplete attribute
checks.suggested_fix: Add autocomplete attribute (e.g., autocomplete="email", autocomplete="given-name")

checks.item: Authentication does not rely only on a cognitive-function test unless an accessible alternative exists
checks.manual_check: Review login/verification tasks and alternatives.
checks.pass_condition: Authentication provides alternatives to cognitive tests (password managers, passkeys, copy-paste)
checks.fail_condition: Authentication requires memorization or transcription with no accessible alternative
checks.suggested_fix: Support password managers (no paste blocking), provide passkey/SSO options

checks.item: Important submissions support review, correction, confirmation, or reversal
checks.manual_check: Test legal/financial/important transactions.
checks.pass_condition: Legal/financial submissions allow review, confirmation, and correction before finalizing
checks.fail_condition: Important submission is processed immediately without review/confirm step
checks.suggested_fix: Add a review/confirm step before final submission of important data

checks.item: Error suggestions are provided where possible
checks.manual_check: Trigger common validation failures and check helpful suggestions.
checks.pass_condition: Validation errors include suggestions for correction when the system can determine them
checks.fail_condition: Error message states the problem but provides no guidance on how to fix it
checks.suggested_fix: Include correction suggestions in error messages (e.g., 'Please enter a valid email like user@example.com')

checks.item: Menus, tabs, accordions, disclosures, and similar components work with the keyboard
checks.manual_check: Test standard keyboard interactions for each widget.
checks.pass_condition: Composite widgets have keyboard event handlers for arrow keys, Enter, Space, Escape as appropriate
checks.fail_condition: Interactive widget has no keyboard event handlers beyond default tab behavior
checks.suggested_fix: Add keyboard event handlers following WAI-ARIA Authoring Practices for the widget pattern

checks.item: Expanded, collapsed, selected, active, and disabled states are exposed programmatically
checks.manual_check: Inspect accessibility tree and state announcements.
checks.pass_condition: State attributes (aria-expanded, aria-selected, aria-disabled, aria-pressed) are present on stateful components
checks.fail_condition: Stateful component (accordion, tab, toggle) missing aria-expanded, aria-selected, or similar state attribute
checks.suggested_fix: Add appropriate ARIA state attributes (aria-expanded, aria-selected, aria-disabled) to the control

checks.item: Dialogs have an accessible name
checks.manual_check: Open dialog and verify accessible name.
checks.pass_condition: Dialog elements have aria-label or aria-labelledby pointing to a visible heading
checks.fail_condition: <dialog> or role="dialog" element has no aria-label or aria-labelledby
checks.suggested_fix: Add aria-labelledby pointing to the dialog's heading element, or add aria-label

checks.item: Focus moves into dialogs when they open
checks.manual_check: Open dialog and verify initial focus.
checks.pass_condition: Dialog open logic includes focus management (element.focus() or autofocus attribute)
checks.fail_condition: Dialog opens without any focus management code
checks.suggested_fix: Call .focus() on the dialog or its first focusable element when opening, or use autofocus attribute

checks.item: Focus is contained within modal dialogs while open
checks.manual_check: Tab / Shift+Tab inside modal and verify containment.
checks.pass_condition: Modal dialog implements focus trapping (Tab cycles within dialog) or uses native <dialog> with showModal()
checks.fail_condition: Modal dialog allows Tab to move focus outside the dialog while it is open
checks.suggested_fix: Use native <dialog>.showModal() which traps focus, or implement a focus trap with keydown listener

checks.item: Focus returns to a logical place when dialogs close
checks.manual_check: Close dialog and verify focus restoration.
checks.pass_condition: Dialog close logic restores focus to the triggering element
checks.fail_condition: Dialog closes without restoring focus to the trigger or another logical element
checks.suggested_fix: Store a reference to the trigger element before opening, and call trigger.focus() on close

checks.item: Background content is not interactable while a modal is open
checks.manual_check: Try interacting outside modal with keyboard and pointer.
checks.pass_condition: Modal uses <dialog>.showModal(), inert attribute on background, or aria-hidden on background content
checks.fail_condition: Modal is open but background content remains interactive (no inert, no aria-hidden on background)
checks.suggested_fix: Use <dialog>.showModal() or add inert attribute to background content while modal is open

checks.item: Important dynamic updates are announced accessibly
checks.manual_check: Trigger async updates and listen with screen reader.
checks.pass_condition: Dynamic content containers have aria-live, role="alert", role="status", or role="log"
checks.fail_condition: Dynamic content updates without any live region markup
checks.suggested_fix: Add aria-live="polite" (or role="status") to the container that receives dynamic updates

checks.item: Status, success, warning, and error messages are exposed without requiring focus
checks.manual_check: Trigger toast/status messages and verify announcement.
checks.pass_condition: Status message containers use role="status", role="alert", or aria-live with appropriate politeness
checks.fail_condition: Status/toast message appears in DOM without live region attributes
checks.suggested_fix: Wrap status messages in an element with role="status" (polite) or role="alert" (assertive)

checks.item: Dynamic updates do not steal focus unless necessary
checks.manual_check: Trigger updates and confirm focus remains stable when appropriate.
checks.pass_condition: Dynamic content updates use aria-live instead of programmatic focus movement
checks.fail_condition: Non-critical dynamic update moves focus away from user's current position
checks.suggested_fix: Use aria-live regions for non-critical updates instead of moving focus

checks.item: Prerecorded audio has a transcript or equivalent
checks.manual_check: Verify transcript/equivalent is available.
checks.pass_condition: <audio> elements have an adjacent or linked transcript
checks.fail_condition: <audio> element exists with no associated transcript link or adjacent text
checks.suggested_fix: Provide a transcript link near the audio player or include transcript text on the page

checks.item: Prerecorded video with audio has captions
checks.manual_check: Play representative videos and inspect captions.
checks.pass_condition: <video> elements have a <track kind="captions"> element
checks.fail_condition: <video> element has no <track kind="captions"> child
checks.suggested_fix: Add <track kind="captions" src="captions.vtt" srclang="en" label="English"> to the video element

checks.item: Video-only content has an equivalent text or audio alternative
checks.manual_check: Verify alternative explains the visual information.
checks.pass_condition: Video-only elements have an adjacent or linked text alternative
checks.fail_condition: Video-only content has no text or audio alternative
checks.suggested_fix: Provide a text description or audio alternative for video-only content

checks.item: Auto-playing audio longer than 3 seconds can be paused, stopped, or independently controlled
checks.manual_check: Check playback controls and autoplay behavior.
checks.pass_condition: <audio>/<video> with autoplay has controls attribute or a visible pause/stop mechanism
checks.fail_condition: Media element has autoplay without controls attribute or visible pause mechanism
checks.suggested_fix: Add controls attribute to the media element, or provide a visible pause/stop button

checks.item: Moving or auto-updating content can be paused, stopped, or hidden when required
checks.manual_check: Inspect carousels, tickers, and animations.
checks.pass_condition: Animated/auto-updating elements have a visible pause, stop, or hide mechanism
checks.fail_condition: Auto-moving/updating content (carousel, ticker) has no pause/stop control
checks.suggested_fix: Add a pause/stop button for carousels, tickers, and auto-updating content

checks.item: Content does not flash above the allowed threshold
checks.manual_check: Review flashing content; test if needed.
checks.pass_condition: No content flashes more than 3 times per second
checks.fail_condition: Content flashes more than 3 times per second or exceeds general flash thresholds
checks.suggested_fix: Reduce flash frequency below 3 per second, or reduce the flashing area

checks.item: Time limits can be turned off, adjusted, or extended unless essential
checks.manual_check: Review session/task timeouts and warnings.
checks.pass_condition: Any time limit provides turn off, adjust, or extend mechanism before expiry
checks.fail_condition: Session or task timeout occurs without warning or extension option
checks.suggested_fix: Add a timeout warning with option to extend, or allow users to disable time limits

checks.item: Dragging interactions have a simple pointer alternative unless essential
checks.manual_check: Test non-drag alternative.
checks.pass_condition: Elements with drag handlers also have click/tap alternative or button-based controls
checks.fail_condition: Element uses drag events (dragstart, ondrag) without a simple pointer alternative
checks.suggested_fix: Add button-based or click alternative for drag interactions (e.g., move up/down buttons)

checks.item: Pointer actions can be canceled where applicable
checks.manual_check: Press, move away, release; verify cancel behavior.
checks.pass_condition: Actions fire on mouseup/pointerup/click (not mousedown/pointerdown) allowing cancel by moving away
checks.fail_condition: Actions fire on mousedown/pointerdown without cancel mechanism
checks.suggested_fix: Move action handlers from mousedown/pointerdown to click/mouseup/pointerup events

checks.item: Prerecorded video includes audio description or equivalent where needed
checks.manual_check: Review videos where visuals carry key meaning.
checks.pass_condition: <video> has <track kind="descriptions"> or a linked audio description alternative
checks.fail_condition: Video with meaningful visual content has no audio description track or alternative
checks.suggested_fix: Add <track kind="descriptions"> or provide a separate audio-described version

checks.item: Live media has captions where required
checks.manual_check: Verify live captions on applicable streams/events.
checks.pass_condition: Live media streams include real-time captions
checks.fail_condition: Live media stream has no captioning mechanism
checks.suggested_fix: Integrate real-time captioning service for live media

checks.item: Motion-based interaction can be disabled unless essential
checks.manual_check: Test shake/tilt/motion controls and settings.
checks.pass_condition: Motion-based features (shake, tilt) can be disabled and have button/click alternatives
checks.fail_condition: Functionality requires device motion with no setting to disable or alternative input
checks.suggested_fix: Provide a setting to disable motion-based interaction and offer button/click alternatives

checks.item: Navigation patterns are used consistently
checks.manual_check: Compare common flows across pages.
checks.pass_condition: Navigation components maintain the same order and structure across pages
checks.fail_condition: Navigation order or structure varies between pages
checks.suggested_fix: Use shared navigation components/templates to ensure consistency across pages

checks.item: Components with the same function are identified consistently
checks.manual_check: Check repeated actions/components for consistent labeling.
checks.pass_condition: Components serving the same function use the same label, icon, and text across all occurrences
checks.fail_condition: Same-function components use different labels or icons on different pages
checks.suggested_fix: Standardize labels and icons for recurring components (e.g., search, print, save)

checks.item: Accessibility APIs are updated correctly when component states change
checks.manual_check: Inspect state changes in accessibility tree.
checks.pass_condition: Custom components update ARIA attributes when state changes (aria-expanded, aria-checked, etc.)
checks.fail_condition: Component changes visual state but does not update corresponding ARIA attributes
checks.suggested_fix: Update ARIA state attributes programmatically when component state changes

checks.item: Accessibility is verified in the browsers and assistive technology combinations your product supports
checks.manual_check: Confirm test matrix and execution evidence.
checks.pass_condition: Testing matrix includes browser + AT combinations the product supports
checks.fail_condition: No documented browser/AT testing matrix or test evidence
checks.suggested_fix: Define and document a browser/AT test matrix; include in QA process
